array_of_detected_blocks_page_line_word_: Array of detected blocks (PAGE, LINE, WORD, TABLE, CELL, KEY_VALUE_SET, etc.)
convert_a_scanned_document_or_image_into: Convert a scanned document or image into plain readable text with AWS Textract OCR. Use to digitize handwritten notes, faxes, or image-only PDFs for indexing or search.
document_input_file_upload_or_url_refere: Document input (file upload or URL reference)
enter_your_aws_access_key_id: Enter your AWS Access Key ID
enter_your_aws_secret_access_key: Enter your AWS Secret Access Key
extract_text_tables_and_forms_from_docum: Extract text, tables, and forms from documents
integrate_aws_textract_into_your_workflo: Integrate AWS Textract into your workflow to extract text, tables, forms, and key-value pairs from documents. Single-page mode supports JPEG, PNG, and single-page PDF. Multi-page mode supports multi-page PDF and TIFF.
run_an_invoice_or_receipt_through_aws_te: Run an invoice or receipt through AWS Textract and return clean structured fields (vendor, date, totals, line items). Use when you need to digitize finance documents.
single_page_uses_synchronous_api_for_jpe: Single Page uses synchronous API for JPEG, PNG, or single-page PDF. Multi-Page uses async API for multi-page PDF/TIFF stored in S3.
turn_a_scanned_form_into_structured_key_: Turn a scanned form into structured key-value pairs and tables using AWS Textract. Use for intake forms, applications, and contracts.
upload_jpeg_png_or_single_page_pdf_max: Upload JPEG, PNG, or single-page PDF (max 10MB)
url_to_jpeg_png_or_single_page_pdf: URL to JPEG, PNG, or single-page PDF
version_of_the_textract_model_used_for_p: Version of the Textract model used for processing
